ores.title: Ore Reference
ores.intro: All mineable ores in Star Citizen at a glance: rarity plus ship, ROC and FPS mining methods. Filter the reference and jump to spawn locations, scan signatures and sell prices per ore.
ores.empty: No ores found — adjust filters or run the seed.

table.name: Name
table.noSignature: No scan signature on record for this ore.

detail.summary: Found at {locationCount, plural, one {# location} other {# locations}} across {systemCount, plural, one {# star system} other {# star systems}} — best chance {probability} % at {body} ({method} mining).
detail.noOccurrences: No known occurrences in the current game version.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.whereQuestion: Where can I find {ore} in Star Citizen?
faq.whereAnswer: {ore} occurs at {locationCount, plural, one {# location} other {# locations}} across {systemCount, plural, one {# star system} other {# star systems}}. The best chance is {probability} % at {body} via {method} mining.
faq.rarityQuestion: How rare is {ore} and how do you mine it?
faq.rarityAnswer: {ore} is a {rarity} ore. It can be mined by {methods}.
